triggerCondition: execution would choose the wrong route
actions.threshold: intent clarity score < 90 and missing answer changes route/scope/risk/acceptance/owner/permission/non-goal
actions.whenResponsible: Before Fetch if intent incompleteness changes the run shape.
whatNotToDo: treat surface request as complete intent
actions.executionAction: Produce intentPacket or explicitAssumption with risk.
actions.correctIf: intent clarity score >= 90 or an explicit low-risk assumption is recorded.
actions.wrongIf: The question is filler, local evidence was skipped, or the answer does not change execution.
actions.blockedIf: A route-changing unknown remains and the user has not answered.
actions.userChoiceRule: Use native choice if available; otherwise chat decision card.
actions.automationRule: May auto-skip only when missing data is inferable and low risk.
actions.verificationRule: validate-intent-amplification must pass for public-ready claims.
actions.evolutionRule: Recurring ambiguity patterns become clarification triggers.

actions.threshold: Any platform or OS claim affects route or permission.
whatNotToDo: treat README claims as verified docs
actions.executionAction: Create platformCapabilityPacket and support gap report.
actions.correctIf: Every relevant capability has support, confidence, trigger, config, OS support, and evidence.
actions.wrongIf: Native support is claimed with unverified confidence or missing trigger evidence.
actions.doneIf: runtime matrix validates and unknowns are explicit.
actions.blockedIf: A required runtime capability is unsupported or unknown and no fallback route exists.
actions.userChoiceRule: Ask only when runtime choice changes scope/risk/cost.
actions.automationRule: Probe is read-only and can run automatically.
actions.evolutionRule: New platform findings update the matrix with lastVerifiedAt.

actions.threshold: Dependency reuse could materially improve path, evidence, or verification.
whatToDo: keep reference-only projects out of dependency routes
whatNotToDo: claim a project was inspected when it was external only
treat README mention as callable capability
actions.correctIf: Can state can-do, cannot-do, invocation path, verification method, and risk.
actions.wrongIf: No input/output contract or verification path exists.
actions.doneIf: At least one suitable candidate scores >= 80 or capabilityGapPacket is created.
actions.blockedIf: Required dependency is missing and no acceptable substitute exists.
actions.userChoiceRule: Ask when dependency choice changes trust, install, cost, or scope.
actions.automationRule: Discovery is read-only; invocation may require approval if it mutates or uses network.
actions.evolutionRule: Usage stats and failure reasons write back to the registry.

actions.threshold: Lens can change path, risk, acceptance, user choice, or first action.
whatToDo: use seed catalog only as fallback
whatNotToDo: use a lens with no decision impact
actions.correctIf: Each selected lens changes at least one decision dimension.
actions.wrongIf: Lens is decorative or every run uses the same list.
actions.doneIf: 3-7 selected lenses and omitted reasons exist.
actions.blockedIf: No lens has decision impact for a non-trivial multi-path task.
actions.userChoiceRule: Do not ask about lenses unless the lens changes user-visible scope or values.
actions.verificationRule: lens-discovery tests assert fallback seeds are not default-enabled.
actions.evolutionRule: Useful/failed lens choices become next-run hints.

triggerCondition: minimal fix differs from shortest correct path
actions.threshold: Path choice changes time, risk, owner, dependency, runtime, OS, or acceptance.
actions.whenResponsible: Thinking after capability and lens discovery.
actions.correctIf: One default is recommended with tradeoffs and verification.
actions.wrongIf: Route has no verification or ignores capability filters.
actions.blockedIf: Evidence is insufficient and no minimum test can be run.
actions.userChoiceRule: Ask when no path >= 85 or user preference changes material tradeoffs.
actions.automationRule: Auto-execute only if score >= 85 and risk is acceptable.
actions.verificationRule: validate-capability-routing checks score bands and gaps.
actions.evolutionRule: Repeated route failures update scoring hints.

actions.threshold: AI cannot safely infer the choice.
actions.whenResponsible: Critical/Thinking/Review when choice changes execution branch.
whatNotToDo: use approval overlay for product choices
actions.correctIf: 2-4 real options include bestFor, benefit, cost, risk, expectedResult, verification.
actions.wrongIf: Options are fake, unactionable, or missing recommended default.
actions.doneIf: User choice or safe skip reason is recorded.
actions.automationRule: Only skip via explicit auto-proceed, trivial path, or low-risk inference.
actions.evolutionRule: Frequent choices become policy defaults when safe.

actions.threshold: Every execution lane needs owner + weapon + verification owner.
whatNotToDo: use governance agent as implementation owner
actions.correctIf: Each worker has owner, weapon, input, output, verificationOwner, dependsOn, parallelGroup, mergeOwner.
actions.wrongIf: Any worker uses general-purpose fallback or lacks verification.
actions.userChoiceRule: Ask if dispatch choice changes risk/cost/scope.

actions.threshold: Mutation or artifact generation is required.
actions.correctIf: Artifacts match task contract and can be reviewed.
actions.wrongIf: Changes are unrelated or evidence is missing.
actions.blockedIf: Permission, dependency, or capability is missing.
actions.automationRule: Deterministic work can run after planning gate.
actions.verificationRule: Review must bind evidence to outputs.
actions.evolutionRule: Execution gaps write back to weapon/dependency registries.

actions.correctIf: Findings have severity, evidence, fix suggestion, and verification.
actions.wrongIf: Review checks only file existence or ignores governance logic.
actions.doneIf: Critical/high findings closed or moved to revision.
actions.userChoiceRule: Ask if fixing finding requires a tradeoff.
actions.verificationRule: Meta-Review checks review standard for high-risk runs.

whatNotToDo: treat command pass as user goal done
actions.correctIf: User goal is actually advanced with executable artifacts and evidence.
actions.wrongIf: Workflow is complete but target state is not reached.
actions.doneIf: userGoalDone=true, intent score >= 90, publicReadyScore >= 90, no unresolved high/critical findings.
actions.blockedIf: Intent acceptance or verification evidence is missing.
actions.userChoiceRule: Ask only if acceptance criteria conflict.
actions.evolutionRule: Failed done claims become regression tests.

actions.threshold: Learning would prevent a future repeat.
actions.correctIf: Next similar task can retrieve and reuse the lesson.
actions.wrongIf: Learning is only a sentence in chat.
actions.doneIf: writebackDecision is writeback or none-with-reason and regressionScarTest exists when needed.
actions.blockedIf: Warden approval or write target is missing.
actions.userChoiceRule: Ask before external or risky writeback.
actions.automationRule: Local registry/test writeback is allowed within scoped task.
actions.verificationRule: Regression test must exercise the reusable rule.
actions.evolutionRule: This action is the durable evolution closure.

fakeOwnerRejectionPolicy.allowedFallbackBoundary: presentation/runtime compatibility only; never owner, capability, evidence, design, or verification readiness
